title: GAO-09-398: SSA Hearings-Backlog Plan — Performance Measures and Risk Assessment (2009)
description: U.S. Government Accountability Office report GAO-09-398 (published Sep 2009) assessing SSA's plan to eliminate the hearings-level disability-claims backlog, the extent to which it reflected sound planning, and potential unintended effects on hearings operations and the broader disability process. Recommends developing performance goals/measures, cost estimates, and formal risk assessments for plan initiatives. Relevant to hearings-level backlog reduction downstream of DDS determinations.

source.title: Social Security Administration: Cases of Federal Employees and Transportation Drivers and Owners — Hearings Backlog Plan Performance Measures (GAO-09-398)

notes: Authoritative: a published GAO report (product GAO-09-398; published and publicly released Sep 09, 2009) mirrored from gao.gov, evaluating the May 2007 hearings-backlog plan and its May 2009 'Draft Appomattox Plan' update. The source 'title' is approximate — confirm exact GAO catalog title at gao.gov before relying on it (the slug 'performance-measures' reflects the report focus). Single publication year so temporal_coverage start==end (2009). Recommendation table is narrative, not a declared column schema.
